transcript:
Speaker A (AI): माकडतोंड्याला English मध्ये काय म्हणतात? [What is 'monkey-faced' called in English?]
Speaker B (Human): माकडतोंड्याला handsome? [Monkey-faced is handsome?]
Speaker A (AI): नाही नाही, माकडतोंड्याला monkey-faced. [No no, monkey-faced is monkey-faced.]
Speaker B (Human): Exactly "Monkey-faced" किंवा "someone who looks like a monkey" असं म्हणता येईल. पुढचा शब्द. शेंबड्याला English मध्ये काय म्हणतात? [Exactly "Monkey-faced" or "someone who looks like a monkey" can be said. Next word. What is 'snotty' called in English?]
Speaker B (Human): Nose water? [Nose water?]
Speaker A (AI): Nose water नाही, "Snotty" किंवा "runny-nosed kid" असं म्हणतात. [Not nose water, it's called "Snotty" or "runny-nosed kid".]
Speaker B (Human): Okay, माझं English pronunciation weak आहे. [Okay, my English pronunciation is weak.]
Speaker A (AI): काही problem नाही. AI Teacher try केलं का? [No problem. Did you try AI Teacher?]
Speaker B (Human): ते खूप महाग असतील ना? [They must be very expensive, right?]
Speaker A (AI): अजिबात नाही. Normal English classes पेक्षा ७ पट स्वस्त आहे. म्हणून १ कोटी लोक MySivi वर English practice करत आहेत. [Not at all. It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 1 crore people are practicing English on MySivi.]
Speaker B (Human): Oh, पण वेळच मिळत नाही. [Oh, but I don't get time.]
Speaker A (AI): रोज फक्त १५ ते २० मिनिटे practice पुरेशी आहे अगदी confident व्हायला. [Just 15 to 20 minutes of practice daily is enough to become very confident.]
Speaker B (Human): Wow, कसं join करू? [Wow, how do I join?]
Speaker A (AI): हा install चा button दाबा आणि MySivi app install करा. Sign up करा आणि practice start करा. फक्त १५ दिवसांत तुम्हाला improvement दिसायला लागेल. चला सुरू करा. [Press this install button and install the MySivi app. Sign up and start practicing. In just 15 days you will start seeing improvement. Let's start.]

summary: An AI robot avatar corrects a Marathi-speaking woman's English translations of common slang terms. The AI then introduces the MySivi app as an affordable, quick way to practice English daily. The ad ends with a call to action to install the app.
